title: luzula nivea var. rubescens
intro: Luzula nivea var. rubescens, also known as Red Flowering Woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial plant with grass-like leaves and reddish-purple flowers that grow in damp, woodland environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin irritations. Luzula nivea var. rubescens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a topical cream or salve, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved wound healing.
